description_long: This is a plush, brown stuffed bear with a rounded body and limbs, featuring a large oval belly and a slightly smaller head. The bear has two prominent round ears on top of its head and a beige snout area with a small, round black nose. Its eyes are large, black, and circular, giving it a simple and friendly appearance. The arms are slightly outstretched and rounded, while the legs are short and positioned to allow the bear to sit upright. The surface appears soft and smooth, typical of a classic teddy bear toy. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the bear.
description: A soft, brown teddy bear with a beige snout, round black eyes, and a friendly, simple appearance. The bear is plush and rounded, with outstretched arms and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bear's rounded profile, protruding snout, and one visible ear and arm.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both round ears, large black eyes, beige snout, and outstretched arms.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the other ear, arm, and leg visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the smooth, rounded back, both ears, and the back of the arms and legs.
attribute_facial_expression: The bear has a neutral and friendly facial expression, with large round black eyes and a small round nose. There is no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs positioned to support a sitting posture. The head is facing forward.
